title: Muck Equipment
description: A Mod that adds Muck ores, tools, and armors!
body:
# Epic Ore Expansion: Mithril, Adamantite & Obamium
![gif for player and horse wearing armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fdc6b6fb02bbd57b43c53bba9463b46358edac5.gif)

**Upgrade your arsenal with legendary metals! This mod introduces three powerful new tiers 
of equipment—Mithril, Adamantite, and Obamium—to dominate your foes in style.**

## 🔹 Features 🔹

💪 **Enhanced Stats** – Superior durability, damage, and enchantability compared to conventional materials.

💎 **Weightless Armor** – Full armor grants above-netherite protection without slowing you down. Sprint, dodge, and dominate.

**3D Modeled Tools** – Every axe, shovel, and pickaxe has intricate designs—no more flat textures!

**Note!**

- For breaking Mithril you need Diamond Pickaxe or Above.
- For breaking Adamantite you need Mithril Pickaxe or Above.
- For breaking Obamium you need Adamantite Pickaxe or Above.

Require Fabric **API** & **Geckolib**


## 🔰 Stats 🔰

-   Attack Damage: 13 | 16 | 20     
-   Attack Speed: 1.6 | 1.6 | 1.8   
-   Mining Speed: 10.0 | 11.0 | 12.0   
-   Durability: 1822 | 2130 | 2431   


## 🔻 Ore Generation 🔻 
  
-   Ore Generate Between:  Y10, Y-80 | Y-15, Y-80 | Y-30, Y-80   
-   Max Ores Size: 5 | 5 | 4
